title: ApprovalRequest
description: Request for Approval (RFA) payload broadcast across the HaaS P2P network

id.description: Unique identifier for this approval request

agentId.description: Identifier of the AI agent that initiated the tool call

toolName.description: Name of the tool/function the agent is trying to execute

toolArgs.description: Arguments passed to the tool call

riskTier.description: Risk classification tier assigned by the Risk Classifier

requiredPools.description: Approver pool topics that must provide signatures

threshold.description: Number of unique signatures required for consensus

minSeniority.description: Minimum seniority level required for the approver

requiredSkills.description: Skills the approver must have verified

acceptedProviders.description: List of accepted identity providers (e.g., linkedin, github, oidc)

agentContext.description: Optional context about the agent's reasoning and intent

traceId.description: OpenTelemetry trace ID for end-to-end observability

spanId.description: OpenTelemetry span ID for this specific request

createdAt.description: ISO 8601 timestamp when the request was created

ttl.description: Time-to-live in seconds before the request expires

callbackUrl.description: Optional webhook URL for async approval notification
